text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm f-finally done... Why is it that when I clean,
things just get messier?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, h-huh? Where is this... place? Why... am I
here?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uugh... The Th-Three Goddesses must hate me...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm always spacing out and causing a mess... Just
why have I turned out like this?
